description: Add tool permission hooks and enhanced cost tracking to hex-agent

specs.description: Tool permission check returns allow for trusted commands
specs.given: A tool execution request for 'Bash' with command 'ls -la'

specs.description: Tool permission check blocks dangerous commands
specs.given: A tool execution request for 'Bash' with command 'rm -rf /'
specs.then: Returns PermissionDecision::Deny with reason 'dangerous command pattern'

specs.description: Tool permission persists across agent sessions
specs.given: A previous session where 'Bash' with 'git commit' was allowed
specs.when: New session starts and executes 'Bash' with 'git commit'
specs.then: Permission is auto-allowed from persisted state

specs.description: Cost calculation handles unknown models gracefully
specs.then: Returns cost of 0 with warning logged, does not error

specs.description: Cost tracking shows USD per request
specs.given: A Claude Sonnet 4 API call with 10000 input tokens and 5000 output tokens
specs.then: Returns approximately $0.45 (based on current Anthropic pricing)

specs.given: A HexFlo task that makes 5 API calls with total $2.00 cost
specs.when: Task completes and cost is queried
specs.then: Returns aggregated cost of $2.00 for the task

specs.description: Permission hook does not block tool execution for non-critical operations
specs.given: A ReadFile tool with a safe path

specs.then: Returns decision within 10ms (cached or simple pattern match)
